MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-05-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Justin D. Schwartz, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Anjanette R. Vela
Victoria E. Townsend, Esq. on behalf of defendant Fernando Villalobos

The parties indicated that this matter had settled. Terms of the settlement were as follows:

Defendant to pay plaintiff the sum of $2,601.00. Plaintiff will dismiss matter with prejudice. Each side to bear their own costs.

Judge Robert Dondero, Clerks: D. Hakewill/V. Mu Reporter: Jo Ann Bruce, #3321 (206)
